text:
Once upon a time, in a vast desert, there was a small, old town. Every morning, as the first rays of the sun crept over the sandy horizon, vendors would set up their stalls, and children would run to collect fresh dates from the dates trees that lined the dusty streets.

It was on one such morning that a mysterious old woman appeared. Her eyes twinkled with ancient wisdom, and her robe was woven from clouds. She approached the local baker, who offered her a freshly baked bread roll.

"I'll take three," she said, smiling. "And do you sell any enchanted fruit? I've heard whispers of a magical peach that grants a wish every sunrise."

The baker laughed. "Enchanted fruit? I'm afraid that's a myth. But how about a nice coffee?" he suggested.

As night fell, the town's favorite storyteller took the woman's address. The next morning, he gathered a group of brave souls and carried her over rocky hills and
